name: Pokemon Emerald
description: Pokémon Emerald is the definitive Gen III Pokémon game and one of the most beloved in the franchise.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Goal
options.description: Determines what your goal is to consider the game beaten.

options.label: Badges
options.description: Adds Badges to the pool.

options.label: Hms
options.description: Adds HMs to the pool.

options.label: Key Items
options.description: Adds most key items to the pool.

options.label: Bikes
options.description: Adds the Mach Bike and Acro Bike to the pool.

options.label: Event Tickets
options.description: Adds the event tickets to the pool, which let you access legendaries by sailing from Lilycove.

options.label: Rods
options.description: Adds fishing rods to the pool.

options.label: Overworld Items
options.description: Adds items on the ground with a Pokeball sprite to the pool.

options.label: Hidden Items
options.description: Adds hidden items to the pool.

options.label: Npc Gifts
options.description: Adds most gifts received from NPCs to the pool (not including key items or HMs).

options.label: Berry Trees
options.description: Adds berry trees to the pool.

options.label: Dexsanity
options.description: Adding a "caught" pokedex entry gives you an item (catching, evolving, trading, etc.).

options.label: Dexsanity Encounter Types
options.description: Determines which Dexsanity encounter areas are in logic.

options.label: Trainersanity
options.description: Defeating a trainer gives you an item.

options.label: Item Pool Type
options.description: Determines which non-progression items get put into the item pool.

options.label: Require Itemfinder
options.description: The Itemfinder is logically required to pick up hidden items.

options.label: Require Flash
options.description: Determines whether HM05 Flash is logically required to navigate a dark cave.

options.label: Elite Four Requirement
options.description: Sets the requirements to challenge the elite four.

options.label: Elite Four Count
options.description: Sets the number of badges/gyms required to challenge the elite four.

options.label: Norman Requirement
options.description: Sets the requirements to challenge the Petalburg Gym.

options.label: Norman Count
options.description: Sets the number of badges/gyms required to challenge the Petalburg Gym.

options.label: Legendary Hunt Catch
options.description: Sets whether legendaries need to be caught to satisfy the Legendary Hunt win condition.

options.label: Legendary Hunt Count
options.description: Sets the number of legendaries that must be caught/defeated for the Legendary Hunt goal.

options.label: Allowed Legendary Hunt Encounters
options.description: Sets which legendary encounters can contribute to the Legendary Hunt goal.

options.label: Wild Pokemon
options.description: Randomizes wild pokemon encounters (grass, caves, water, fishing).

options.label: Wild Encounter Blacklist
options.description: Prevents listed species from appearing in the wild when wild encounters are randomized.

options.label: Starters
options.description: Randomizes the starter pokemon in Professor Birch's bag.

options.label: Starter Blacklist
options.description: Prevents listed species from appearing as starters when starters are randomized.

options.label: Trainer Parties
options.description: Randomizes the parties of all trainers.

options.label: Trainer Party Blacklist
options.description: Prevents listed species from appearing in opponent trainers' parties if opponent parties are randomized.

options.label: Force Fully Evolved
options.description: When an opponent uses a pokemon of the specified level or higher, restricts the species to only fully evolved pokemon.

options.label: Legendary Encounters
options.description: Randomizes legendary encounters (Rayquaza, Regice, Latias, etc.).

options.label: Misc Pokemon
options.description: Randomizes non-legendary static encounters.

options.label: Types
options.description: Randomizes the type(s) of every pokemon.

options.label: Abilities
options.description: Randomizes abilities of every species.

options.label: Ability Blacklist
options.description: Prevent species from being given these abilities.

options.label: Level Up Moves
options.description: Randomizes the moves a pokemon learns when they reach a level where they would learn a move.

options.label: Move Match Type Bias
options.description: Sets the probability that a learned move will be forced match one of the types of a pokemon.

options.label: Move Normal Type Bias
options.description: After it has been decided that a move will not be forced to match types, sets the probability that a learned move will be forced to be the Normal type.

options.label: Tm Tutor Compatibility
options.description: Sets the percent chance that a given TM or move tutor is compatible with a species.

options.label: Hm Compatibility
options.description: Sets the percent chance that a given HM is compatible with a species.

options.label: Tm Tutor Moves
options.description: Randomizes the moves taught by TMs and move tutors.

options.label: Reusable Tms Tutors
options.description: Sets TMs to not break after use (they remain sellable).

options.label: Move Blacklist
options.description: Prevents species from learning these moves via learnsets, TMs, and move tutors.

options.label: Min Catch Rate
options.description: Sets the minimum catch rate a pokemon can have.

options.label: Guaranteed Catch
options.description: Every throw is guaranteed to catch a wild pokemon.

options.label: Normalize Encounter Rates
options.description: Make every slot on an encounter table approximately equally likely.

options.label: Exp Modifier
options.description: Multiplies gained experience by a percentage.

options.label: Blind Trainers
options.description: Trainers will not start a battle with you unless you talk to them.

options.label: Purge Spinners
options.description: Trainers will rotate in predictable patterns on a set interval instead of randomly and don't turn toward you when you run.

options.label: Match Trainer Levels
options.description: When you start a battle with a trainer, your party's levels will be automatically set to match that trainer's highest level pokemon.

options.label: Match Trainer Levels Bonus
options.description: A level bonus (or penalty) to apply to your team when matching an opponent's levels.

options.label: Double Battle Chance
options.description: The percent chance that a trainer with more than 1 pokemon will be converted into a double battle.

options.label: Better Shops
options.description: Pokemarts sell every item that can be obtained in a pokemart (except mail, which is still unique to the relevant city).

options.label: Remove Roadblocks
options.description: Removes specific NPCs that normally stand in your way until certain events are completed.

options.label: Extra Boulders
options.description: Places strength boulders on Route 115 which block access to Meteor Falls from the beach.

options.label: Extra Bumpy Slope
options.description: Adds a bumpy slope to Route 115 which allows access to Meteor Falls if you have the Acro Bike.

options.label: Modify 118
options.description: Changes the layout of Route 118 so that it must be crossed with the Acro Bike instead of Surf.

options.label: Free Fly Location
options.description: Enables flying to one random location (excluding cities reachable with no items).

options.label: Free Fly Blacklist
options.description: Disables specific locations as valid free fly locations.

options.label: Hm Requirements
options.description: Sets the requirements to use HMs outside of battle.

options.label: Turbo A
options.description: Holding A will advance most text automatically.

options.label: Receive Item Messages
options.description: Determines whether you receive an in-game notification when receiving an item.

options.label: Remote Items
options.description: Instead of placing your own items directly into the ROM, all items are received from the server, including items you find for yourself.

options.label: Music
options.description: Shuffles music played in any situation where it loops.

options.label: Fanfares
options.description: Shuffles fanfares for item pickups, healing at the pokecenter, etc.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.

options.label: Enable Wonder Trading
options.description: Allows participation in wonder trading with other players in your current multiworld.

options.label: Easter Egg
options.description: Enter certain phrases and something special might happen.
